---
title: "Schema Study: A Large Language Model (LLM) Application for Asynchronous Student Learning and Inquiry"
date: 2026-01-01
---

[Read the paper on QUBESHub](https://qubeshub.org/community/groups/coursesource/publications?id=5776){.btn .btn-primary}
[Socratic Tutor System Instructions](../../genai/tools/schema-study/socratic-tutor-prompt.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

---

Reuther, K., Mueller, L. O., Constantian, G., & Nguyen, A. (2026). [Schema Study: A Large Language Model (LLM) Application for Asynchronous Student Learning and Inquiry](https://qubeshub.org/community/groups/coursesource/publications?id=5776). *CourseSource Teaching Tools and Strategies*.

Schema Study is a free, open-source web application that converts a spreadsheet of course terms into an AI-powered study coach for biology students. Using a Socratic questioning approach, the app provides personalized formative feedback and guided inquiry without revealing direct answers. During a pilot in a 225-student introductory biology course:

{{< include ../../../_includes/schema-study-stats.md >}}

The production version is freely available at [https://huggingface.co/spaces/keefereuther/Schema_Study](https://huggingface.co/spaces/keefereuther/Schema_Study).
